summary: Tested WashSlot backend and frontend end-to-end. All 10 backend pytest cases pass (CRUD, validation, conflict detection incl. 2h overlap with 1h, queue rules, _id exclusion). Frontend critical flows (login, schedule, day selector 7 days, 24 slots, booking modal with 1h, slot reflects as booked, theme toggle+persistence, logout) all PASS.

integration_issues.issue: After logout/login as second user, slot-join-queue-{hour} selector was not immediately present (likely race with reservation fetch). Functionality may still work after the data loads; UX could benefit from a loading skeleton on slot grid until reservations are fetched.

action_items: Consider awaiting the initial reservations fetch before rendering slot rows (or show skeleton) so that re-login users immediately see existing bookings (improves Join Queue UX).
Optional: trim user_name length / sanitize input on login.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly excludes Mongo _id via projection on all reads. Overlap logic handles 2h-vs-1h correctly using set intersection.
Cancel/queue compare names case-insensitively which is consistent. Good.
BookingModal canBook2h only checks daySlotMap[bookingHour+1] which mirrors backend rule for hour<23; consistent.
No business-logic bugs found. Code is clean and under 200 lines per file.
seed_data_creation: Tests create/cleanup reservations on date today+30 with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_reservations.py and self-clean using TEST_ prefix + today+30 date. Frontend uses localStorage keys washslot.user and washslot.theme. data-testids are well placed (login-name-input, login-submit-button, schedule-page, day-button-{iso}, slot-row-{h}, slot-book-{h}, slot-booked-{h}, slot-cancel-{h}, slot-join-queue-{h}, slot-leave-queue-{h}, booking-modal, booking-duration-1h/2h, booking-confirm-button, theme-toggle, logout-button).
